_comment: This is the entire universe of layouts the system can render. The AI never invents a new template — it only picks one of these and fills its slots. Grow this list deliberately over time; do NOT let the model free-generate markup. Each template lists which device_classes it supports and how it degrades.

templates.description: Scrollable list of records with avatars, badges, optional meta column, and per-row action affordance.
Single record hero header, labeled field grid, and action button bar.
Typed editable fields for a create/update action with submit/cancel chrome.
Compact summary tile: headline metric + sublabel for embedding in another surface.
Minimal watch display: primary metric (ring for numbers), optional secondary badge, one action.
Large-type, D-pad navigable list with focus state and action hints.
Master-detail split: scrollable list pane plus selected-record detail with actions. Canonical tablet/desktop layout.
Metric dashboard: title, grid of stat cards from numeric/enum fields, action bar.
